title: AI CV Extraction Pipeline Demo
summary: Safe cached demo showing how a CV/resume can be chunked, classified, and converted into structured JSON.
logs: Detecting section headers using spacing/capitalization/divider patterns...
Sending enriched chunks to orchestrator LLM...
Extracting structured output with smaller model...
architecture: Flow: PDF/DOCX upload → text extraction → visual chunking → LLM section detection → structured JSON → validation.
steps: Accepts a PDF/DOCX style CV document
Extracts text and detects section boundaries using visual clues
Chunks the document into safer smaller sections
Uses an LLM workflow to classify sections and extract structured data
Validates the final output as clean JSON for downstream systems
